subject: Guest count revision – Graduation ceremony
body:
Dear team,

Following last-minute withdrawals, we need to revise the guest count for our graduation ceremony at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles from 40 to 30 attendees.

Please adjust catering quantities and seating layout accordingly.

Best regards,
Maria Theresa Becker
Feldspar Events

subject: Venue layout change – Innovation forum Amsterdam
body:
Dear Event Pulse,

For our innovation forum at the Ziggo Dome – Diamond Lounge in Amsterdam, we would like to reconfigure the room layout from theatre-style to roundtable format for our 611 attendees.

This will require adjustments to seating, tables, and AV positioning. Could you confirm feasibility and any cost impact?

Kind regards,
Nadia Benali
Atlas Pharma

subject: Additional AV services – RSE day Cairo
body:
Hello,

For our RSE day at the Cairo International Convention Centre with 1,180 guests, we would like to add a second large LED screen in the overflow room and a professional live simultaneous recording setup.

Please provide availability and pricing for these additions.

Best,
Nkechi Adeyemi
Flintstone Events

subject: Catering menu update – Graduation ceremony Oslo
body:
Hi,

For our graduation ceremony at Akershus Fortress Courtyard in Oslo, we would like to switch from the standard buffet menu to a plated 3-course dinner for our 609 guests.

Given the outdoor setting, please also confirm that heating lamps are included and that the catering team has experience with outdoor service in Norway.

Thanks,
Joaquín Torres
Lapis Events

subject: Photography service cancellation – Budapest graduation
body:
Dear Event Pulse,

We have decided to use our own corporate photography team for the graduation ceremony at Papp László Budapest Sportaréna.

Please cancel the photography service line from our booking for the 136-guest event. All other services remain unchanged.

Regards,
René Dubois
Citrine Financial

subject: Additional power outlets – Corporate hackathon Hyderabad
body:
Dear team,

For our corporate hackathon at Falaknuma Palace – Durbar Hall in Hyderabad, our 214 participants will each require a dedicated power outlet and high-speed Wi-Fi access point.

Could you arrange for additional technical infrastructure (power strips, network switches) and update the setup accordingly?

Best regards,
Ananya Patel
Topaz Retreats

subject: Security reinforcement – Leadership summit Edinburgh
body:
Hi,

Given the outdoor location of our leadership summit on the Edinburgh Castle Esplanade, and considering that several high-profile executives will be attending, we would like to add 2 additional security personnel to the 44-guest event.

Please confirm availability and the additional cost.

Best,
Björn Sigurdsson
Obsidian Isle

subject: Dietary requirements update – Open day Playa del Carmen
body:
Hello,

For our open day at Xcaret – Teatro Gran Tlachco in Playa del Carmen, we have updated dietary requirements for our 74 guests: 18 are vegetarian, 6 are vegan, and 4 have gluten intolerance.

Please update the catering order accordingly and confirm the menu can accommodate these needs.

Thanks,
Emily Thompson
Crestwood Corp

subject: VIP lounge area – Project kick-off Lisbon
body:
Dear Event Pulse,

For our project kick-off at Centro Cultural de Belém – Grande Auditório in Lisbon, we would like to add a dedicated VIP lounge area for 30 senior executives within the venue.

This would require premium seating, a separate catering service, and dedicated AV for the 1,083-guest event. Please advise on options and pricing.

Best regards,
Thomas Müller
Blackrock Events

subject: AV upgrade request – Graduation ceremony Helsinki
body:
Hi,

For our graduation ceremony at Messukeskus – Hall 7 in Helsinki with 877 guests, we would like to upgrade the audio-visual setup to include a large curved LED video wall and a professional live streaming service.

Please confirm availability and provide a quote for this upgrade.

Kind regards,
Lena Petersen
Mirage Entertainment

subject: Reduce guest count – Corporate hackathon Kyoto
body:
Dear team,

Unfortunately due to budget constraints we need to reduce our guest count from 86 to 60 for the corporate hackathon at the Kyoto International Conference Center.

Please adjust all services (catering, seating, workstations, etc.) accordingly.

Best regards,
Sven Andersen
Marl Events

subject: Live streaming setup – Project kick-off Prague
body:
Hello,

For our project kick-off at Prague Congress Centre with 58 participants, we need to add a professional live streaming setup so that remote team members across 5 countries can follow the event.

Please include a multi-camera setup, a streaming encoder, and a dedicated internet uplink in the quote.

Regards,
René Dubois
Citrine Financial

subject: Entertainment change – Inauguration cocktail Jodhpur
body:
Hi,

For our inauguration cocktail at Umaid Bhawan Palace – Peacock Courtyard in Jodhpur, we would like to replace the jazz orchestra currently booked with a 3-piece traditional Rajasthani folk music ensemble to better match the venue's heritage atmosphere.

Our 47 guests will enjoy the outdoor setting more with live traditional music that reflects the local culture. Please check availability and adjust the entertainment line.

Best,
Lars Eriksson
Pewter & Partners

subject: Extend event duration – Design thinking workshop Zurich
body:
Dear Event Pulse,

We need to extend our design thinking workshop at the Zürich Marriott – Grand Ballroom by 2 hours due to additional keynote sessions added to the agenda.

Could you please extend all service bookings (catering, AV, staffing) accordingly for our 981 participants and confirm the additional cost?

Kind regards,
Bogdan Kovač
Sandstone Media

subject: Floral decoration addition – Training day Riyadh
body:
Hello,

For our training day at King Abdulaziz ICC – Grand Hall in Riyadh, we would like to add premium floral arrangements to the stage and entrance areas to enhance the professional atmosphere for our 870 attendees.

Please provide pricing for a full floral decoration package appropriate for this large indoor venue.

Best regards,
Ioana Popescu
Quartz Arena

subject: Reduce bar service – Graduation ceremony Diamniadio
body:
Dear team,

Following updated company guidelines, we need to reduce the bar service for our graduation ceremony at CICC – Abdou Diouf in Diamniadio to soft drinks and non-alcoholic beverages only for the 150 guests.

Please remove the full bar package and replace with a premium soft drink station.

Regards,
Charlotte Davies
Sterling Banquet

subject: Move event indoors – Weather concerns for Dakar anniversary
body:
Dear Event Pulse,

We are concerned about the weather forecast for our anniversary celebration at Île de Gorée – Place du Gouvernement in Dakar. There is a risk of rain on the event date.

Is it possible to relocate our 54-guest event to an indoor venue in the area? Please advise on available options and any cost implications.

Best regards,
Vanessa Richter
Amber Consulting

subject: Stage decoration upgrade – Graduation ceremony Hamburg
body:
Hello,

For our graduation ceremony at Hamburgische Staatsoper in Hamburg, we would like to upgrade the stage decoration to include a custom backdrop with our company logo and premium floral arrangements.

The ceremony will have 70 guests and the stage will be the focal point of the event. Please provide options and pricing.

Kind regards,
Maria Theresa Becker
Feldspar Events

subject: Additional exhibition stands – Professional salon Riyadh
body:
Dear team,

For our professional salon at King Abdulaziz ICC – Grand Hall in Riyadh, we need to add 8 additional exhibition stands to accommodate new participating companies.

The event currently has 204 attendees and we anticipate a 15% increase in foot traffic with these additions. Please update the floor plan and provide a quote.

Best regards,
Roberto Esposito
Quartz Financial

subject: Shuttle service addition – Creative workshop Muscat
body:
Hello,

For our creative workshop at the Oman Convention & Exhibition Centre in Muscat, we would like to add a shuttle service from the major hotels in the city centre to the venue for our 317 participants.

We need 3 round trips in the morning and 3 in the evening. Could you coordinate this and include it in our booking?

Best,
Bernard Leclerc
Onyx Productions

subject: Climate control adjustment – Commercial roadshow Cairo
body:
Dear Event Pulse,

Our commercial roadshow at Cairo International Convention Centre is scheduled during a cooler period and we anticipate the air conditioning may make the venue too cold for our 139 guests.

Could you please ensure the HVAC is set to a comfortable temperature and add portable heating units as a backup? Please confirm and adjust services accordingly.

Regards,
Charlotte Davies
Sterling Banquet

subject: Premium catering upgrade – Investor dinner New York
body:
Hi,

For our investor dinner at The Metropolitan Museum – Temple of Dendur in New York, we would like to upgrade to a premium 5-course gastronomic menu with wine pairing for our 32 guests.

This is a high-profile evening for key stakeholders and we want to ensure an exceptional dining experience. Please provide menu options and pricing for this upgrade.

Best regards,
Nadia Benali
Atlas Pharma

subject: Simultaneous translation service – VIP evening Sun City
body:
Dear team,

For our VIP client evening at Sun City – The Superbowl in South Africa, we have confirmed attendees from 6 countries who will require simultaneous translation in English, French, German, and Mandarin.

Please add a simultaneous translation setup (booths, headsets, interpreters) for our 86 guests.

Best regards,
Thomas Müller
Blackrock Events

subject: Entertainment removal – Budget revision Dublin exhibition
body:
Hello,

Due to budget revisions, we need to remove the entertainment package (live band and DJ) from our corporate art exhibition at Convention Centre Dublin.

The 987 guests will still enjoy the exhibition and catering, but we will manage background music internally. Please remove entertainment services and provide the revised total.

Regards,
David Park
Zenith Aerospace

subject: Catering upgrade – Business lunch Cairo
body:
Dear Event Pulse,

For our business lunch at Cairo International Convention Centre, we would like to upgrade the menu from a standard buffet to a premium plated lunch for our 62 guests.

We would also like to add a vegetarian main course option and a selection of Egyptian specialties to reflect the local culture. Please provide menu options and the cost difference.

Best regards,
Jean-Claude Lambert
Cerulean Pharma

subject: Increase security staff – Incentive trip La Hulpe
body:
Dear team,

Our incentive trip at Château de la Hulpe will include several public figures and senior executives among our 416 guests. We would like to add 4 additional security personnel for the duration of the event.

Please confirm availability and provide the additional cost for enhanced security coverage.

Best regards,
Siobhán Murphy
Ruby Red Events

subject: Extended cocktail service – Inauguration Sydney Opera House
body:
Hi,

For our inauguration cocktail at Sydney Opera House – Concert Hall, we would like to extend the cocktail reception by 1.5 hours and add a champagne tower for the toast moment.

We also want to include a roaming canape service for our 164 guests throughout the extended reception. Please update the catering package accordingly.

Best,
Laura Chen
Nexora Group

subject: Outdoor heating addition – Incentive trip Bourglinster
body:
Dear Event Pulse,

For our incentive trip at Château de Bourglinster – Courtyard in Luxembourg, we are expecting cool evening temperatures and would like to add outdoor heating for our 790 guests.

Please include a sufficient number of industrial patio heaters for the courtyard area and confirm whether tent covers are also available. This is essential for guest comfort.

Kind regards,
Sarah O'Brien
Foxglove Hospitality

subject: Replace DJ with classical musicians – Corporate festival Barcelona
body:
Dear team,

For our corporate festival at Palau de la Música Catalana in Barcelona, we feel that a DJ would be incongruous with the venue's stunning Art Nouveau architecture.

We would like to replace the DJ with a classical string quartet and a flamenco ensemble for the 914 guests. Please check availability and update the entertainment line.

Best regards,
Valentina López
Obsidian Group

subject: Decor upgrade – Inauguration cocktail Hermitage Museum
body:
Hello,

For our inauguration cocktail at Hermitage Museum – St George Hall in Saint Petersburg, we would like to add premium decorations in keeping with the venue's imperial grandeur: golden centrepieces, candelabras, and a custom flower arrangement for the entrance.

Our 93 guests will appreciate a décor that matches the exceptional setting. Please provide options and pricing.

Best regards,
Isabella Rossi
Spectrum Analytics
